calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jin Sheng Li was present in pro per on behalf of himself and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Zhi Ding Li.
Petitioner Qi Zhang was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Zhi Ding Li.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Jieying Ming was placed under oath and served as Mandonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jason Jinsheng Lee.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Edward Zhiding Lee.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
